Overview Quick Start Interactive Samples Root Schema example extensions link metadata presentation purpose rich-text status component pattern style theme token accessibility anatomy api best-practice content design-specifications guideline interaction motion principle scale state variant

10 definitions in this file:

  • spacingSpec
  • sizingSpec
  • typographyEntrySpec
  • typographySpec
  • responsiveEntry
  • designValue
  • designProperties
  • specVariant
  • specSize
  • specState
  • specVariantState
  • designSpecifications
Padding and internal gaps within the component. Keys are named spatial relationships between anatomy parts or edges (e.g., 'container-horizontal', 'container-vertical', 'icon-to-label', 'label-to-description'). Values are token names or resolved values (e.g., 'space-4', '8px'). Internal spacing is owned by the component and does not change based on context. Recommended margins and gaps between this component and its siblings or container edges. Keys are named spatial relationships to surrounding elements (e.g., 'button-to-button', 'button-group-gap', 'stack-gap'). Values are token names or resolved values. External spacing is a recommendation — the parent layout ultimately controls the space between components. Minimum width as a token name or resolved value (e.g., 'size-button-min-width', '64px'). Maximum width as a token name or resolved value (e.g., 'size-dialog-max-width', '600px'). Minimum height as a token name or resolved value (e.g., 'size-button-min-height', '44px'). Maximum height as a token name or resolved value. Aspect ratio constraint as a ratio string (e.g., '16/9', '1/1', '4/3'). Font family token name or resolved value (e.g., 'font-family-body', 'Inter, sans-serif'). Font size token name or resolved value (e.g., 'font-size-body', '14px', '0.875rem'). Font weight token name or resolved value (e.g., 'font-weight-regular', '400', 'bold'). Line height token name or resolved value (e.g., 'line-height-body', '1.5', '20px'). Letter spacing token name or resolved value (e.g., 'letter-spacing-body', '0.01em'). Text transform value (e.g., 'uppercase', 'capitalize', 'none'). A composite typography token that encapsulates multiple typographic properties (e.g., '$body-compact-01', 'type-scale-body-sm'). When a type token is provided, individual properties (fontSize, fontWeight, etc.) serve as documentation of what the token resolves to.

Open map: keys are strings, values are any

References: typographyEntrySpec The breakpoint name or value at which this behavior applies (e.g., 'small', 'medium', 'large', '768px', 'min-width: 1024px'). How the component's layout, sizing, or behavior changes at this breakpoint. References: richText [ { "breakpoint": "768px", "description": "Below 768px, buttons in a button group stack vertically and expand to full width." }, { "breakpoint": "1024px", "description": "Above 1024px, the minimum button width increases from 44px to 64px to provide a more comfortable click target on desktop." } ]

Open map: keys are strings, values are designValue

References: designValue The variant name (e.g., 'primary', 'secondary', 'ghost', 'danger'). Matches values defined in the component's variants guideline. Optional description explaining how the variant differs visually from the base specification. Property values that differ from the base specification for this variant. Only properties that change need to be listed. Spacing overrides for this variant. Only relationships that change need to be specified. Sizing overrides for this variant. Only constraints that change need to be specified. Typography overrides for this variant. Only text elements that change need to be specified. References: designProperties, spacingSpec, sizingSpec, typographySpec, richText The size name (e.g., 'small', 'medium', 'large'). Matches values defined in the component's variants guideline. Optional description explaining how the size differs visually from the base specification. Property values that differ from the base specification for this size. Only properties that change need to be listed. Spacing overrides for this size. Only relationships that change need to be specified. Sizing overrides for this size. Only constraints that change need to be specified. Typography overrides for this size. Only text elements that change need to be specified. References: designProperties, spacingSpec, sizingSpec, typographySpec, richText The state name (e.g., 'hover', 'active', 'focus', 'disabled', 'loading'). Matches values defined in the component's states guideline. Optional description explaining how the state differs visually from the base specification. Property values that differ from the base specification for this state. Only properties that change need to be listed. Spacing overrides for this state. Only relationships that change need to be specified. Sizing overrides for this state. Only constraints that change need to be specified. Typography overrides for this state. Only text elements that change need to be specified. References: designProperties, spacingSpec, sizingSpec, typographySpec, richText The variant name (e.g., 'primary', 'secondary', 'ghost'). Must match a name defined in the variants array. The state name (e.g., 'hover', 'active', 'focus', 'disabled'). Must match a name defined in the states array. Optional description explaining how this variant+state combination differs visually. Property values that differ from the base, variant, and state specifications for this combination. Only properties that change need to be listed. References: designProperties, richText Identifies this guideline as a design specifications document. Base design properties for the default configuration. Maps property names to token names or raw CSS values. Use the variants, sizes, and states arrays to document how property values change per condition. Base spacing specification for the default configuration. Override per variant, size, or state using their respective arrays. Base sizing specification for the default configuration. Override per size using the sizes array. Base typography specification for the default configuration. Override per size using the sizes array. Responsive behavior documentation describing how the component adapts across breakpoints. Entries are ordered from smallest to largest breakpoint. Variant-specific specifications documenting how design properties change for each variant (e.g., 'primary', 'secondary'). Each entry lists only the values that differ from the base specification. Size-specific specifications documenting how design properties change for each size (e.g., 'small', 'large'). Each entry lists only the values that differ from the base specification. State-specific specifications documenting how design properties change for each interactive state (e.g., 'hover', 'focus', 'disabled'). Each entry lists only the values that differ from the base specification. Variant+state combination specifications documenting how design properties change when a specific variant is in a specific state (e.g., 'primary' + 'hover'). Each entry lists only the values that differ from the base, variant, and state specifications. Constraint: At least one of properties, spacing, sizing, typography, responsive, variants, sizes, states, variantStates must be present. References: designProperties, spacingSpec, sizingSpec, typographySpec, responsiveEntry, specVariant, specSize, specState, specVariantState { "kind": "design-specifications", "properties": { "background": "color-surface-default", "text-color": "color-text-default", "border-color": "color-border-default", "border-width": "1px", "border-radius": "radius-medium", "padding-horizontal": "space-4", "padding-vertical": "space-2", "font-size": "14px", "font-weight": "500", "line-height": "20px", "icon-size": "16px", "icon-color": "color-icon-default", "icon-gap": "space-2", "focus-ring-color": "color-focus-ring", "focus-ring-width": "2px", "focus-ring-offset": "2px", "min-height": "40px", "opacity": "1" }, "spacing": { "internal": { "container-horizontal": "space-4", "container-vertical": "space-2", "icon-to-label": "space-2" }, "external": { "button-to-button": "space-2", "button-group-gap": "space-3" } }, "sizing": { "minWidth": "64px", "minHeight": "40px" }, "typography": { "label": { "fontSize": "14px", "fontWeight": "500", "lineHeight": "20px", "typeToken": "$body-compact-01" } }, "responsive": [ { "breakpoint": "320px", "description": "Below 320px, buttons expand to full width." }, { "breakpoint": "768px", "description": "Below 768px, button groups stack vertically." } ], "variants": [ { "name": "primary", "description": "Solid background with light text.", "properties": { "background": "color-action-primary", "text-color": "color-text-on-action", "border-width": "0px" } }, { "name": "secondary", "properties": { "background": "transparent", "text-color": "color-action-primary", "border-color": "color-action-primary", "border-width": "1px" } } ], "sizes": [ { "name": "small", "description": "Compact — 32px height.", "properties": { "min-height": "32px", "font-size": "12px" }, "spacing": { "internal": { "container-horizontal": "space-3", "container-vertical": "space-1" } }, "sizing": { "minHeight": "32px" } }, { "name": "large", "description": "Touch-optimized — 48px height.", "properties": { "min-height": "48px", "font-size": "16px" }, "sizing": { "minHeight": "48px" }, "typography": { "label": { "fontSize": "16px", "lineHeight": "24px" } } } ], "states": [ { "name": "focus", "description": "2px ring, 2px offset. All variants.", "properties": { "focus-ring-color": "color-focus-ring", "focus-ring-width": "2px", "focus-ring-offset": "2px" } }, { "name": "disabled", "description": "Opacity 0.4, pointer-events none.", "properties": { "opacity": "0.4" } } ], "variantStates": [ { "variant": "primary", "state": "hover", "properties": { "background": "color-action-primary-hover" } } ] }

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification

GitHub
